2.188.verse_text: The talented musicians Rasollasa-devi, Gunatunga-devi,Kalakanthi-devi, Sukhanti-devi, and Pikakanti-devi delight Lord Hari by singing Visakha's musical compositions.

attributes: serves the divine couple by playing musical instruments like drums, cymbals, string instruments, and wind instruments
serves the divine couple by playing musical instruments like drums, cymbals, string instruments, and wind instruments
serves the divine couple by playing musical instruments like drums, cymbals, string instruments, and wind instruments
served by Maniki-devi, Narmada-devi, and Kusumapesala-devi through musical performance

2.189.verse_text: Maniki-devi, Narmada-devi, and Kusumapesala-devi serve the divine couple by playing drums, cymbals, string instruments like the vina, and wind instruments like the flute.

attributes: gopi friends serving the divine couple in different categories
eternal gopi friends of the divine couple
gopi friends who are as dear as life itself
dear gopi friends of the divine couple
dearest gopi friends of the divine couple

2.190.verse_text: In this way we have described some of the sakhis (gopi friends), nitya-sakhis (eternal gopi friends), prana-sakhis (gopi friends who are as dear as life), priya-sakhis (dear gopi friends) and parama-prestha-sakhis (dearest gopi friends)

attributes: has maidservants including the leaders Ragalekha, Kalakeli, and Bhurida
one of the leaders of the gopīs who are maidservants to Rādhārāṇī
one of the leaders of the gopīs who are maidservants to Rādhārāṇī
one of the leaders of the gopīs who are maidservants to Rādhārāṇī

maidservant of Rādhārāṇī and daughter of Nanda Mahārāja's laundry washers

2.191.verse_text: Srimati Radharani's Maidservants: Ragalekha-devi, Kalakeli-devi and Bhurida-devi are the leaders fo those gopis who are Srimati Radharani's maidservants. Among these maidservants are Sugandha-devi and Nalini-devi (the two daughters of Divakirti-devi) and Manjistha-devi and Rangaraga-devi (the two daughters of Nanda Maharaja's laundry washers).

attributes: serves Śrīmatī Rādhārāṇī by dressing and decorating Her
served by Palindri-devī through dressing and decoration
decorated with various cosmetics by Citrini

astrologer who reveals the future to Śrīmatī Rādhārāṇī

2.192.verse_text: Palindri-devi serves Srimati Radharani by dressing and decorating Her. Citrini decorates Radharani with various cosmetics. Mantriki-devi and Tantriki-devi are astrologers who reveal the future to Srimati Radharani.

attributes: leader of the gopi messengers older than Śrīmatī Rādhārāṇī
mistress served by Bhagyavatī-devī and Puṇyapuñja-devī

maidservant serving Śrīmatī Rādhārāṇī
master of the sweeper whose daughters are Bhāgyavatī and Puṇyapuñja

2.193.verse_text: Katyayani-devi is the leader of those gopi messengers who are older than Srimati Radharani. Bhagyavati-devi and Punyapunja-devi, the two daughters of Maharaja Nanda's sweeper, are also the maidservants of Srimati Radharani.

attributes: leader of those girls descended from the uncivilized Pulinda mountain tribe
leader of those girls descended from the uncivilized Pulinda mountain tribe
leader of those girls descended from the uncivilized Pulinda mountain tribe

place where Pulinda girls serve as friends to Rādhārāṇī and Kṛṣṇa

2.194.verse_text: Tunga-devi, Malli-devi and Matalli-devi are the leaders of those girls descended from the uncivilized mountain tribe known as the Pulindas. In Vrndavana some of the Pulinda girls act as the friends of Srimati Radharani and some are the friends of Sri Krsna.

girl from the vita community serving Srimati Radharani

cowherd boy serving Srimati Radharani
cowherd boy serving Srimati Radharani
cowherd boy serving Srimati Radharani
cowherd boy serving Srimati Radharani

2.195.verse_text: Also included among Srimati Radharani's servants are Gargi-devi and other very respectable brahmana girls, Bhrngarika-devi and other girls from the ceti community, Vijaya-devi, Rasala-devi, Payoda-devi and other girls from the vita community, as well as the boys Subala, Ujjvala, Gandharva, Madhumangala and Raktaka.

attributes: served by Tunga-devi, Pisangi-devi, and Kalakandala-devi who remain near Her
served by Manjual-devi, Bindula-devi, Sandha-devi, and Mrdula-devi
always remains near Śrīmatī Rādhārāṇī to serve Her

very young devotee engaged in Śrīmatī Rādhārāṇī's service
very young devotee engaged in Śrīmatī Rādhārāṇī's service

2.196.verse_text: Tunga-devi, Pisangi-devi and Kalakandala-devi always remain near Srimati Radharani to serve Her. Manjual-devi, Bindula-devi, Sandha-devi, Mrdula-devi and others, although very young still engage in Radharani's service.

pet cakori bird belonging to Srimati Radharani

2.197.verse_text: Sunada, Yamuna and Bahula are the most important of Srimati Radharani's pet surabhi cows. Tungi is Her chubby pet calf, Kakkhati is Her old pet monkey, Rangini is Her pet doe and Carucnadrika is Her pet cakori bird.

attributes: pet swan of Srimati Radharani
fond of swimming in the waters of Radha-kunda
owner of pet swan Tundikeri

owner of pet parrots Suksmadhi and Subha

pet elephant belonging to Srimati Radharani

one of the two pet parrots belonging to Srimati Radharani

2.198.verse_text: Tundikeri is the name of Radharani's pet swan, who is fond of swimming in Radha-kunda. Madhuri is Radharani's pet elephant and Suksmadhi and Subha are Her two pet parrots.

attributes: perfectly imitate Lalita-devi's playful jokes spoken to her master and mistress
astonish the gopis by their wonderful repetition of playful jokes
speaks playful jokes to her master and mistress
the master and mistress to whom Lalita-devi speaks playful jokes
astonished by the wonderful repetition of the parrots

2.199.verse_text: The two parrots perfectly imitate Lalita-devi's playful jokes spoken to her master and mistress (Sri Sri Radha-Krsna). By this wonderful repetition the parrots astonish the gopis.

attributes: adorned with a tilaka marking named Smarayantra
wears a jeweled necklace named Harimohana
wears jeweled earrings named Rocana
decorated with a pearl on Her nose named Prabhakari

2.200.verse_text: Srimati Radharani's Ornaments: Srimati Radharani's tilaka marking is named Smarayantra. Her jeweled necklace is named Harimohana, Her jeweled earrings are named Rocana and the pearl decorating Her nose is named Prabhakari.

attributes: possessor of a locket named Madana containing a picture of Kṛṣṇa
possessor of the Syamantaka jewel known as Sankhacuda-siromani
locket containing a picture of Lord Kṛṣṇa named Madana
jewel also known as Sankhacuda-siromani or Sankhacuda's crest-jewel
Lord whose picture is contained within the Madana locket

2.201.verse_text: Her locket which contains a picture of Lord Krsna, is named Madana. Her Syamantaka jewel is also known as Sankhacuda-siromani (Sankhacuda's crest-jewel).

attributes: wears an auspicious neck jewel called Puspavan that eclipses sun and moon
wears anklets called Catakarava producing sounds like warbling cataka birds
wears bracelets known as Manikarvura
auspicious jewel necklace that eclipses the simultaneous rising of the sun and moon
anklets whose tinkling sounds resemble the warbling of cataka birds
ornamental bracelets worn by Śrīmatī Rādhārāṇī

2.202.verse_text: The auspicious jewel She wears around Her neck is called Puspavan because it eclipses the simultaneous rising of the sun and moon (puspavan) with its splendor. Her anklets are called Catakarava because their tinkling sounds resemble the warbling of cataka birds. Her bracelets are called Manikarvura.

attributes: possessor of a signet ring named Vipaksamardini
adorned with a sash named Kancanacitrangi
wearer of ankle-bells named Ratnagopura

signet ring belonging to Srimati Radharani
sash worn by Srimati Radharani
ankle-bells that stun Lord Krsna with their tinkling sounds

2.203.verse_text: Srimati Radharani's signet ring is named Vipaksamardini. Her sash is named Kancanacitrangi and Her ankle-bells, which stun Lord Krsna with their tinkling sounds, are named Ratnagopura.

attributes: possesses garments known by the name Meghambara
favors the lower garment which is the color of a blue cloud
fond of the ruby-red upper garment worn by Śrīmatī Rādhārāṇī

2.204.verse_text: Srimati Radharani's garments are named Meghambara. Her upper garment is red like a ruby and it is the favorite of Lord Hari. Radharani's lower garment is the color of a blue cloud and it is Her own favorite.

attributes: possessor of a jeweled mirror named Sudhamsudarpaharana
jeweled mirror that removes the moon's pride

2.205.verse_text: Srimati Radhrani's jeweled mirror is named Sudhamsudarpaharana, which means "that which removes (harana) the moon's (sudhamsu) pride (darpa)."

attributes: possesses a golden stick for applying mascara named Narmada
possesses a jeweled comb named Svastida
possesses a private flower garden named Kandarpakuhali
golden stick used for applying mascara
jeweled comb for grooming hair
private flower garden belonging to Srimati Radharani

2.206.verse_text: Her golden stick for applying mascara is named Narmada, Her jeweled comb is named Svastida and Her private flower garden is named Kandarpakuhali.

attributes: possesses a garden containing a vine of golden jasmine flowers
has named the golden jasmine vine Tadidvalli
has a private lake that bears her own name
engages in very confidential talks with Lord Kṛṣṇa
vine of golden jasmine flowers situated in Radharani's garden
named by Radharani as the vine of lightning
private lake bearing the name of Radharani
site of a kadamba tree used for confidential talks
engages in very confidential talks with Radharani under a kadamba tree

2.207.verse_text: In Radharani's garden is a vine of golden jasmine flowers that She has named Tadidvalli ("the vine of lightning"). Her private lake bears Her own name (Radha-kunda) and on the shore of that lake is a kadamba tree that is the site of very confidential talks between Her and Lord Krsna.

attributes: prefers the musical ragas known as mallara and dhanasri
expert in performing the dances called chalikya and rudravallaki

2.208.verse_text: Her favorite ragas are mallara and dhanasri and Her favorite dances are chalikya and rudravallaki.

attributes: glorious birth occurred on the eighth day of the bright moon in the month of Bhadra
appearance in this world celebrated by the moon appearing full

2.209.verse_text: Srimati Radharani's glorious birth occurred on the eighth day of the bright moon in the month of Bhadra. Although generally not full on that day, the moon appeared full to celebrate Radharani's appearance in this world.

attributes: two monarchs of the sacred forest of Śrī Vṛndāvana
sacred forest ruled by the divine couple

2.210.verse_text: In this way we have revealed a little about the countless associates of Sri Sri Radha and Krsna, the two monarchs of Sri Vrndavana.

mother of Lalita-devi

husband of Lalita-devi
close friend of the cowherd Govardhana-gopa
close friend of Bhairava

1.81.verse_text: Her mother is Saradi-devi and her father is Visoka. Her husband is named Bhairava. He is a close friend of Govardhana-gopa.

attributes: her husband is Arama
her mother is Vatika-devi

possessor of qualities much like those of Campakalata

1.85.verse_text: Her husband is Arama, her mother is Vatika-devi and her husband is Candaksa. Her qualities are much like those of Visakha.

attributes: her marriage with Vakreksana was arranged by his younger brother
form and qualities are so similar to her sister Rangadevi
often mistaken for her sister Rangadevi
his marriage with Sudevi was arranged by his younger brother
her form and qualities are so similar to her sister Sudevi
often mistaken for her sister Sudevi

1.95.verse_text: Her marriage with Vakreksana was arranged by his younger brother. Her form and other qualities are so similar to those of her sister Rangadevi that they are often mistaken for one another.

attributes: personification of sweetness and charm
wears garments with the spotted color of an old francoline partridge
married to the cowherd known as Garjara-gopa or Garuda-gopa
also known as Garuda-gopa
husband of Śikhāvatī

1.114.verse_text: She is like sweetness and charm personified. Her garments are the spotted color of an old francoline partridge. She is married to Garjara-gopa, who is also known as Garuda-gopa.

attributes: especially dear to the sakhis Lalita and Visakha
proud husband of Ananga-manjari
brother-in-law of Ananga-manjari's sister
holds a deep and special affection for Ananga-manjari
holds a deep and special affection for Ananga-manjari

1.120.verse_text: Her proud husband Durmada is also her sister's brother-in-law. She is especially dear to Lalita and Visakha.

attributes: expert in playing music on pots filled with varying degrees of water
learned in the literature describing astronomy and astrology
well versed in the theoretical and practical activities of protecting domestic animals

1.177.verse_text: She is expert in playing music on pots filled with varying degrees of water. She is learned in the literature describing astronomy and astrology, and she is well versed in the theoretical and practical activities of protecting domestic animals.

attributes: has full faith in Śrī Kṛṣṇa
very expert at arranging the meeting of the divine couple
learned in rasa-śāstra, morality, dancing, drama, and literature
proficient in all other arts and sciences
object of the full faith of Tuṅgavidyā
whose meeting is arranged by the expertise of Tuṅgavidyā

1.182.verse_text: She has full faith in Krsna. She is very expert at arranging the meeting of the divine couple. She is learned in rasa-sastra (transcendental mellows), niti-sastra(morality), dancing, drama, literature and all other arts and sciences.

attributes: expert at stringing various kinds of wonderful necklaces
skilled in decorating the teeth with red substances
knowledgeable in the science of gemology
expert in weaving various kinds of cloth

1.188.verse_text: She is expert at stringing various kinds of wonderful necklaces, decorating the teeth with red substances, gemology and weaving various kinds of cloth.

attributes: the divine couple whose meeting is arranged by a dear friend
one to whom the subject is very dear
member of the divine couple
expert at arranging the meeting of the divine couple
charming and full of transcendental love for the divine couple
cheerful and full of many good qualities
very dear to Kṛṣṇa

2.44.verse_text: He is expert at arranging the meeting of the divine couple. He is charming and full of transcendental love for Them. He is cheerful and full of good qualities. He is very dear to Krsna.

attributes: son of Sudakṣiṇa and Bhadra-devī
younger brother of Vasudāma
always plunged in transcendental love for the divine couple
father of Arjuna
mother of Arjuna
elder brother of Arjuna
recipients of the constant transcendental love of Arjuna

2.46.verse_text: His father is Sudaksina, his mother Bhadra-devi, and his elder brother Vasudama. He is always plunged in transcendental love for the divine couple.

attributes: saintly mother of the very playful boy
great soul father of the very playful boy
twelve years old and full of youthful luster
decorated with many kinds of flowers
very playful and very dear to Śrī Kṛṣṇa
person to whom the playful boy is very dear

2.50.verse_text: His mother is the saintly Mitra-devi and his father the great soul Vinoka. He is very playful and very dear to Sri Krsna.

decorated with many different flower garlands

2.52.verse_text: He is eleven years old. He is decorated with many different flower garlands. His mother is the saintly Saradi-devi and his father is the great soul Pingala.

attributes: eleven years and four months of age
son of the father named Puskara
son of the famous mother named Medha-devi
father of the personality named Kokila
famous mother of the personality named Kokila

2.56.verse_text: He is eleven years and four months of age. His father is named Puskara and his mother is the famous Medha-devi.

adorned with beautiful garlands of flowers
son of the father named Arunaksa
son of the mother named Mallika-devi
father of the cowherd boy Sanandana
mother of the cowherd boy Sanandana

2.58.verse_text: He is fourteen years old. He wears garlands of flowers. His father is Arunaksa and his mother is Mallika-devi.

attributes: fourteen years old and full of youthful luster
son of Matuka and Rocana-devi
father of Vidagdha
mother of Vidagdha

2.61.verse_text: He is fourteen years old and full of youthful luster. His father is named Matuka and his mother is Rocana-devi.

attributes: son of the saintly Sandipani Muni
son of the chaste Sumukhi-devī
brother of Nandimukhi-devī
grandson of Paurṇamāsī-devī
saintly father of Madhumangala
chaste mother of Madhumangala
sister of Madhumangala
parental grandmother of Madhumangala

2.64.verse_text: His father is the saintly Sandipani Muni, his mother the chaste Sumukhi devi, his sister is Nandimukhi-devi and his parental grandmother is Paurnamasi-devi.

attributes: like a perfect crest jewel decorating the land of Vraja
expert at making various arrangements for the meeting of Radha and Krsna
brother of the learned and famous Paurṇamāsī
participant in meetings arranged by Paurṇamāsī
participant in meetings arranged by Paurṇamāsī

2.91.verse_text: Her brother is Devaprastha. She is like a perfect crest jewel decorating the land of Vraja. She is expert at making various arrangements for the meeting of Radha and Krsna.
